observedBuilds.reason: The packaged app-server binary cannot be executed by the current shell ACL and does not emit Capability Manifest v1.

releaseOrder: Publish and sign the Codex Rust build, Manifest, Schema and Fixtures.
Run CodexMonitor offline contract replay against the published artifacts.
Run real app-server smoke and Profile restart tests in a controlled environment.
Add the exact server build to serverBuilds with status compatible.
Deploy the server build to a canary Codex Host pool.
Deploy Web/Server code with dependent features disabled by policy.
Enable capabilities incrementally after health and error checks.
Rollback Web feature policy first, then server build, without rewriting Profile Home.
